title: The Rebellion Regroups After Udon
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Big Mom as After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
scene: After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Between the flower capital and Kuri

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You will be checked for similarities to the wanted criminals!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi, get those last two out of here! Quick!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She tired herself out crying, so she's asleep against me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not even have words for this, Ashura!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: mean, they're gonna need a lil' touchin' up, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We picked 'em up from the Harbors across Wano that Kaido destroyed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With this many, we can take as many thousands of soldiers to Wano as we want.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How supremely reliable of you! I've changed my opinion of you, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oh, right. Flattery doesn't work on you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't just sleep those 20 years away, you & know.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let us ask franchise to carry out the necessary repairs!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems the RAID really will be possible, friends!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hurry! Carry 'em out on the double!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Look, just keep makin' sweets, okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I swear, I knocked her ship off that waterfall.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't leave a job half-done, King! Damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why'd you bring her here, big brother queen?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The hell was I gonna do with her in Udon, cut off from every- one else?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are three races that my country lacks.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of them may have been lost to the sands of time, but...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Rebellion Regroups storyline with 44 dialogue beats. After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
